articles.title: OpenAI o1 System Card
articles.summary: OpenAI releases system card for o1 model series trained with large-scale reinforcement learning for chain of thought reasoning. The models show state-of-the-art performance on safety benchmarks through deliberative alignment capabilities.

articles.title: MiniCPM-o 4.5: Towards Real-Time Full-Duplex Omni-Modal Interaction
articles.summary: New multimodal model enabling real-time streaming interaction across vision, audio, and text modalities. Addresses key bottlenecks in current MLLMs by enabling simultaneous perception and response rather than alternating phases.

articles.title: Length Value Model: Scalable Value Pretraining for Token-Level Length Modeling
articles.summary: Introduces LenVM, a framework for modeling remaining generation length at the token level. Addresses the need for fine-grained length control in autoregressive models where generation length affects both cost and reasoning performance.

articles.title: GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Interactive v. non-interactive mode
articles.summary: Guide explaining the differences between CLI interactive and non-interactive modes in GitHub Copilot. Helps developers understand when to use each mode for optimal productivity.

articles.title: ScaleBox: Enabling High-Fidelity and Scalable Code Verification for Large Language Models
articles.summary: High-fidelity and scalable system for code verification in large-scale LLM training. Addresses limitations in existing systems that fail to provide accurate verification under high-concurrency workloads.

articles.title: Pentagon strikes classified AI deals with OpenAI, Google, and Nvidia — but not Anthropic
articles.summary: Pentagon announces deals with major AI companies including OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Nvidia, xAI, and Reflection for classified AI tools. Notably excludes Anthropic, declaring it a supply-chain risk despite previous use.

articles.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
articles.summary: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for a massive funding round within 48 hours. The potential $900B+ valuation would mark one of the largest AI company valuations to date.

articles.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
articles.summary: Apple reports being supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo due to unexpected AI-driven demand. Indicates stronger than anticipated adoption of AI capabilities in Mac hardware.

articles.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
articles.summary: During trial testimony, Musk reveals xAI used OpenAI models to train Grok through distillation. Highlights ongoing tensions between frontier AI labs over model copying and competitive practices.

articles.title: When Your LLM Reaches End-of-Life: A Framework for Confident Model Migration in Production Systems
articles.summary: Framework for migrating production LLM systems when underlying models reach end-of-life. Uses Bayesian statistical approach to calibrate automated evaluation metrics against human judgments for confident model comparison.

articles.title: End-to-end autonomous scientific discovery on a real optical platform
articles.summary: Demonstrates first end-to-end autonomous scientific discovery using LLM agents on real physical systems. Produces nontrivial experimental results supported by evidence, moving beyond assisting predefined research workflows.

articles.title: The Inverse-Wisdom Law: Architectural Tribalism and the Consensus Paradox in Agentic Swarms
articles.summary: Challenges the assumption that agent collaboration mirrors 'Wisdom of the Crowd' by formalizing the Consensus Paradox. Shows through 36 experiments that agentic swarms prioritize internal architectural agreement over external logical truth.

articles.title: Contextual Agentic Memory is a Memo, Not True Memory
articles.summary: Argues that current agentic memory systems implement lookup rather than true memory, creating a category error with consequences for agent capability. Distinguishes between retrieval-based similarity matching and weight-based rule generalization.

articles.title: Codex CLI 0.128.0 adds /goal
articles.summary: Update to Codex CLI adding new goal functionality for better task management and planning capabilities.

articles.title: Our evaluation of OpenAI's GPT-5.5 cyber capabilities
articles.summary: Analysis and evaluation of cybersecurity capabilities in OpenAI's GPT-5.5 model, examining potential security implications and defensive applications.

articles.title: We need RSS for sharing abundant vibe-coded apps
articles.summary: Discussion on the need for RSS-like syndication mechanisms for sharing AI-generated applications and vibe-coded projects across the development community.
